reviews.review_title: Meh but has promise for the future
reviews.review_description: I love the game, but it gets boring quickly, so the price is just. I'd love to see the content in the future, but right now, it's just the same waves on the same 3 maps with the same 3 guns. Right now, I think the game just isn't ready but has promise. If you want something cheap and fun, go ahead and buy this. If you want long play sessions with tons of action, you'll get action, but it'll be hard not to get bored in long sessions.
